codeExamples.python:
import requests

base_url = 'http://localhost:3010'
path = '/auth/credentials'
url = f'{base_url}{path}'

response = requests.post(
    url,
    headers={
        'Authorization': 'Bearer b07543de64ea5674029b1a4d694a6f62862f4fce49ce36486c922f08a44f07f9'
    },
    json={
      "name": "Test Foundry Server",
      "foundryUrl": "http://localhost:30000",
      "foundryUsername": "testgm",
      "foundryPassword": "testpassword123"
    }
)
data = response.json()
print(data)

  💭 Connect and send

import requests

base_url = 'http://localhost:3010'
path = '/auth/credentials'
url = f'{base_url}{path}'

response = requests.get(
    url,
    headers={
        'Authorization': 'Bearer b07543de64ea5674029b1a4d694a6f62862f4fce49ce36486c922f08a44f07f9'
    }
)
data = response.json()
print(data)

codeExamples.python:
import requests

base_url = 'http://localhost:3010'
path = '/auth/credentials/145'
url = f'{base_url}{path}'

response = requests.patch(
    url,
    headers={
        'Authorization': 'Bearer b07543de64ea5674029b1a4d694a6f62862f4fce49ce36486c922f08a44f07f9'
    },
    json={
      "name": "Updated Server Name",
      "foundryUrl": "http://localhost:31000",
      "foundryPassword": "testpassword123"
    }
)
data = response.json()
print(data)

codeExamples.python:
import requests

base_url = 'http://localhost:3010'
path = '/auth/credentials/145'
url = f'{base_url}{path}'

response = requests.delete(
    url,
    headers={
        'Authorization': 'Bearer b07543de64ea5674029b1a4d694a6f62862f4fce49ce36486c922f08a44f07f9'
    }
)
data = response.json()
print(data)
